title: 凋零石劍│Wither Stone Sword
description: 凋零骷髏會掉落凋零石劍而不是石劍。│Wither Skeletons now drop Wither Stone Swords instead of Stone Swords.
body:
# 功能│Function
- 使用擊殺凋零骷髏後掉落的石劍來攻擊會對攻擊目標造成10秒凋零Ⅰ。│Using the stone sword dropped by a Wither Skeleton to attack the target will inflict Wither Ⅰ for 10 seconds.
- 輸入該指令可獲取凋零石劍：```/loot give @s loot wither_stone_sword:wither_stone_sword```。│Enter this command to get the Wither Stone Sword: ```/loot give @s loot wither_stone_sword:wither_stone_sword```.
## 凋零石劍具有以下特性│The Wither Stone Sword has the following characteristics
  - 不可附魔│Unenchantable
  - 透過凋零石劍挖掘適合用劍挖掘的方塊不會加快挖掘。│Mining sword-compatible blocks with a Witherstone Sword will not speed up mining.
  - 不會造成橫掃攻擊│Does not cause sweep attacks
  - 具有2031點耐久度│Has 2031 durability

該數據包透過名為"凋零 (00:10)"的自訂附魔來實現此效果，因此如果您在創造模式物品欄中看到帶有"凋零 (00:10)"附魔的附魔書，請忽略它。│The datapack achieves this effect via a custom enchantment called "Wither (00:10)", so if you see an enchanted book with the "Wither (00:10)" enchantment in your Creative Inventory, please ignore it.
# 更多│More
[點我](https://modrinth.com/user/Special_TT)查看更多我的作品。│[Click me](https://modrinth.com/user/Special_TT) to see more of my works.
